description: Lead contract-prep team — proposal drafting, redlines, and economic package for the 2027 agreement.

description: Handles member inquiries, dues questions, and benefit enrollment support.
name: Member Services

description: Represents skilled-trades classifications on apprenticeship and journeyman language.

description: Administers healthcare, pension, and retiree benefit language and vendor relations.
